_comment: Claude Code project settings. Hooks fire automatically at the events configured below. Skills load on demand when referenced by name. Hooks are written in Python for cross-platform support (Windows + macOS + Linux).

PreToolUse._comment: Blocks dangerous bash commands BEFORE they run. Exit 1 = blocked, exit 0 = allowed.
Enforces wiki invariants: raw/ is immutable, wiki/log.md is append-only.

PostToolUse._comment: Logs every file edit to .claude/edit-log.txt with timestamp. Non-blocking.
